🤜 WRESTLING
STORY

THE SEQUEL
A CAREER MODE EXPERIENCE — ANCIENT HISTORY EDITION
25 WEEKS · BUILD YOUR LEGEND · SUBMIT TO THE HALL OF FAME
CLICK OR PRESS ENTER TO START
📖 HOW TO PLAY
EACH WEEK YOU…
① CHANCE CARD
Life events — good and bad. Stats change.
② CHINA QUESTION
Answer correctly = +1 INT. Study hard!
③ PRESS CONF
Make a choice. Real consequences.
④ FIGHT OR TRAIN
Pick a match for XP+money, or train +1 stat.
BATTLE — TURN-BASED d20 DICE ROLLS
STRIKE — SPD roll, STR dmg. Safe.
PWR SLAM — Big dmg, 20% fumble.
GRAPPLE — TEC roll+dmg. Consistent.
RECOVER — Heal HP. No damage.
HIGH RISK — Huge dmg, 35% fumble.
SMART CTR — INT 10+. Zero risk.
FINISHER — Once per match. Use wisely!
CRIT HIT — Roll 18–20 = 1.5x!
6 STATS
STR — Strike+Slam damage
SPD — Strike+High Risk accuracy
TEC — Grapple accuracy+damage
STA — Max HP + Recover amount
CHA — Finisher power
INT — Raised by questions ONLY
SCORE FORMULA
Wins x100 • Title x500
Money/100 • Level x50
INT x10
Submit at career end!
QUICK TIPS
INT 10 unlocks Smart Counter • INT 15 boosts all TEC rolls
Save often — 3 save slots in career hub
Buy Manager ($3K) for +15% all purses forever
Save Finisher for enemy below 40% HP
Recover below 35% HP — survival matters
Win a match to clear injury • Rivalries = bonus XP+money
Chase all 4 titles: Indie / Regional / National / World
